creator: asami@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed


Thanks, committed.  By the way, I noticed an extra newline at the 
end of Makefile (which I took out).  One of the reasons why we insist 
on diffs used for port updates is so that you can check these by 
yourself! :) 

Also, there were a few files deleted and some added.  It is great if 
you can list them explicitly somewhere in the PR, so we won't forget
